data.title: In HelloNation, Pest Control Expert Chris David of Staten Island, NY, Breaks Down DIY Pest Control Mistakes
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Staten Island, a PRNewswire article discussed the common issue of DIY pest control failing to effectively eliminate infestations and potentially exacerbating the problem. The article featured insights from Pest Control Expert Chris David from Recon Pest Control Inc. located in Staten Island, NY. David highlights the reasons behind this phenomenon, shedding light on the complexities and challenges faced by individuals attempting DIY pest control.

data.title: Novartis Strikes $3 Billion Deal For Next-Gen Breast Cancer Drug
data.description: Novartis AG has finalized an agreement to purchase a next-generation PI3Kα inhibitor program from Synnovation Therapeutics, as part of its effort to enhance its breast cancer pipeline. The acquisition of SNV4818, an oral, pan-mutant–selective PI3Kα inhibitor currently in Phase 1/2 trials for breast cancer and advanced solid tumors, is focused on treating HR-positive, HER2-negative breast cancer patients. Approximately 40% of these patients possess PIK3CA mutations associated with unfavorable outcomes. Novartis aims to bolster its oncology portfolio by developing precision medicines such as SNV4818 that can complement existing therapies like CDK inhibitors and endocrine therapies. This strategic move aligns with Novartis’ goal of improving treatment options in the breast cancer space.

data.title: Skylark Labs Conducts Fixed Foreign Object Debris Detection Demonstration Aboard Indian Navy Aircraft Carrier
data.description: Skylark Labs revealed on March 20, 2026 that they have accomplished a fixed foreign object debris detection demonstration on an Indian Navy aircraft carrier. This achievement validates the continuous autonomous deck monitoring system in one of naval aviation's highly challenging environments.

data.title: Monport Laser Highlights Easter Production Opportunities with Advanced Laser Engraving Solutions
data.description: In anticipation of Easter approaching, Monport Laser, based in New York, is emphasizing the opportunity for businesses to meet seasonal demand by utilizing cutting-edge engraving technologies. The company is showcasing the effectiveness of tools like the CO2 laser engraver, fiber laser machine, and UV laser marking system. Businesses can leverage these solutions to enhance product offerings and meet consumer needs during this holiday season.

data.title: Monitor energy use with alerts - ahead of the summer heat
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on March 20, 2026, Duke Energy Florida is advising customers to take advantage of its Usage Alerts program as temperatures increase in the state. This tool assists in tracking energy consumption and predicting monthly bills in advance. By signing up for this program, customers can more effectively manage their energy usage and potentially reduce costs.

data.title: NextEra Energy receives approval from President Donald J. Trump to develop up to 10 GW of natural gas‑powered generation to meet nation's historic power demand
data.description: In Juno Beach, Florida on March 19, 2026, NextEra Energy, Inc., recognized as the leading energy infrastructure developer in the U.S. and listed on NYSE as NEE, announced that President Donald J. Trump has given the green light for the construction of a maximum of 10 gigawatts of natural gas-fueled generation in Texas.
